pkgmetadata.longdescription: Terminal for Simple and Beautiful.. image httpstravis-ci.orgleptureterminal.pngbranchmaster target httpstravis-ci.orgleptureterminal.. image httpscoveralls.ioreposleptureterminalbadge.pngbranchmaster target httpscoveralls.iorleptureterminalA better terminal tools for python.Find documentation at Read The Docs_... _Read The Docs httpsterminal.readthedocs.orgFeatures-------- An easy to use command parser Full featured ANSI colors and styles Full featured prompt communication Nested and verbose logging No dependencies (windows need colorama)Installation------------To install terminal, simply pip install terminalContribute----------Read the Contribution Guide_... _Contribution Guide httpsgithub.comleptureterminalblobmasterCONTRIBUTING.rst
